    APIData

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static YAMLData
    Configuration.getYAMLData(YAMLObject yamlObject)
    Returns yamlData for the given yamlObject by determining what type it is and calling the appropriate method.
    static YAMLData
    YAMLData.loadYaml(File fileName)
    Returns the usable YAMLData object from the given File object.
    static YAMLData
    YAMLData.loadYaml(String fileName)
    Returns YAMLData for the given fileName as a string.
    private static YAMLData
    Configuration.loadYAMLData(String yamlName)
    Returns data from yaml file.
